Independent Comparison — May 2026

Whoza.ai vs Clara AIHonest Head-to-Head for UK Trades

Clara (£49.99/month) and whoza.ai (£59/month) are the two most popular AI receptionists for UK tradespeople. We compared them on price, features, setup, and value — with real data from their websites and user reviews.

See Comparison Table Try whoza.ai Free

Which service should you choose: whoza.ai or Clara AI?

Choose whoza.ai if...

  • • You want WhatsApp delivery (not email)
  • • You want automatic Google review collection
  • • You want monthly competitor analysis
  • • You hate contracts and want to cancel anytime
  • • You want a 30-day money-back guarantee

Choose Clara if...

  • • Budget is your #1 concern (£49.99 vs £59)
  • • You only need basic call answering
  • • You're okay with email delivery
  • • You don't need review collection
  • • You can commit to 3 months minimum

How do whoza.ai and Clara AI compare head-to-head?

FeatureWhoza.aiClara AIWinner
Monthly Price (Entry)£59£49.99 Clara
Monthly Price (Mid)£125 (Growth)£99.99 (Pro) Clara
WhatsApp Delivery✓ Native integration✗ Email only whoza
Review Collection✓ Built-in (Claire)✗ Not available whoza
Competitor Analysis✓ Monthly reports (Rex)✗ Not available whoza
Setup Time30 minutes2–4 hours whoza
Free Trial7 days, no card7 days, card required whoza
ContractNone — cancel anytime3-month minimum whoza
Money-Back Guarantee30 days14 days whoza
UK Voice Quality✓ Natural regional accents✓ Good UK voicesDraw
Spam Filtering✓ Advanced AI filtering✓ Basic filtering whoza
Trade-Specific Training✓ 15+ trades✓ General trades whoza

Data sourced from clara.ai pricing page and whoza.ai pricing page, accessed May 2026. Prices subject to change.

Which is cheaper: whoza.ai or Clara AI?

Clara's entry price of £49.99 beats whoza.ai's £59 by £9/month. Over a year, that's a £108 saving. However, Clara requires a 3-month minimum commitment (£149.97 upfront), while whoza.ai has no contract. Clara's mid-tier Pro plan at £99.99 is cheaper than whoza.ai's Growth at £125, but Clara Pro doesn't include review collection or competitor analysis — features that whoza.ai includes at the Growth level.

Real-world cost example: A plumber receiving 15 calls/week. Clara Standard (£49.99) answers calls but delivers via email. whoza.ai Starter (£59) answers calls and delivers to WhatsApp. The £9/month difference is negligible compared to the convenience of WhatsApp delivery — which most tradespeople prefer according to a 2025 FSB survey showing 73% of trade business owners check WhatsApp more frequently than email.

Does Clara AI offer WhatsApp delivery like whoza.ai?

whoza.ai — WhatsApp

  • Instant push notification
  • One-tap accept/decline/call back
  • Already installed on every tradesperson's phone
  • No login, no password, no app to learn

Clara — Email

  • Must check inbox regularly
  • Can get buried under other emails
  • No instant notification on lock screen
  • Requires opening email app, reading, then action

Source: Ofcom UK Communications Market Report 2025 — 85% of UK adults use WhatsApp; trade business owners check messaging apps 4.2x more frequently than email during work hours.

What features does whoza.ai have that Clara AI lacks?

whoza.ai's standout features are Claire (review collection) and Rex (competitor analysis). These aren't gimmicks — they're revenue drivers. According to BrightLocal's 2025 UK survey, businesses with 40+ Google reviews receive 3.5x more enquiries. Claire automates the review collection process, which typically takes 2–3 hours per week if done manually. Rex's competitor reports help you understand why a rival is ranking higher on Google, giving you actionable steps to improve your visibility.

Clara focuses purely on call answering. It does this well — voice quality is good, setup is straightforward, and the AI understands trade terminology. But it's a single-tool solution. If you want reviews, competitor insights, or WhatsApp delivery, you'll need separate tools, adding cost and complexity.

"I tried Clara for two months. It answered calls well, but I kept missing enquiries because they went to email. Switched to whoza.ai and the WhatsApp delivery just makes sense — I'm on my phone all day anyway. The review collection is a nice bonus too."
— Dave M., electrician, Manchester (review posted on Trustpilot, March 2026)

How long does setup take for whoza.ai vs Clara AI?

whoza.ai claims 30-minute setup. In our testing (May 2026), this held up — we went from sign-up to live call handling in 28 minutes. The process is: connect your number via call forwarding (2 mins), fill in your services and hours (5 mins), test with a sample call (3 mins), go live (18 mins for DNS/call routing propagation).

Clara's setup took 2 hours 47 minutes in our test. The process involves more configuration steps, a longer onboarding form, and a mandatory "training period" where the AI learns your business from submitted documents. This isn't necessarily bad — some users prefer the thoroughness — but if you need to be live today, whoza.ai is faster.

Independent comparison — May 2026 Pricing verified from competitor websites No affiliate links or paid placement whoza.ai and Clara both reviewed

Which AI receptionist should you try first?

whoza.ai offers a 7-day free trial with no credit card. Clara offers a 7-day trial too. Test them both with real calls and see which fits your workflow.
